tool_args.label: Revenue Variance vs Forecast YTD November 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenue of $881.1 million was $35.3 million higher than the forecast
Through November ridership was 47.8 million, 52.4% above 2021 and (42.6)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels
(42.6)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels
Commutation ridership of 19.2 million was 121.5% above 2021

tool_args.label: Commutation Ridership Change vs 2021 YTD November 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation ridership of 19.2 million was 121.5% above 2021
Non-Commutation ridership of 28.6 million was 26.0% above 2021
Farebox revenue of $416.7 million was $15.3 million higher than the forecast
Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,903.8 million were $124.7 million or 6.1% favorable to the forecast

tool_args.label: Preliminary Close and Kronos Outage Caveat

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results. Subsequent revision may also be required due to impacts of Kronos timekeeping system outage.
payload.description: November 2022 results are preliminary, subject to review/adjustment, and may require revision due to Kronos timekeeping system outage
